raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/year> bought tickets online from XXXX. Macy 's declined the transaction awaiting confirmation from me that the transaction was mine. I went to XXXX  & saw the order was canceled, so I purchased alternative less desirable tickets because I already made travel & accommodation arrangements for the concert. XXXX  XXXX virtual assistant couldn't refund a transaction that was canceled, so I filed a dispute with Macy 's XXXX XXXX. I received a letter today stating I'm responsible for the transaction because all sales are final. I called Macy 's, they said the case # XXXX was open for 7 days, I asked to speak to a supervisor, they gave me XXXX  left a message since the hours are XXXX XXXX EST to request a charge back, I didn't want to waist the 60 day timeline since they're ultimately responsible for accepting a charge they declined & was canceled by XXXX, but now doesn't exist through XXXX any longer.
